body_txt: A Blood-Splattered Warrior is exactly that, a combatant drenched in blood. This is often used to show how insanely badass the character is due to the implication that they either took multiple wounds yet stood their ground , or were drenched in their opponents' blood . Or both. Contrast its Sister Tropes , Blood-Splattered Innocents and Blood-Splattered Wedding Dress for innocents and brides, respectively. Expect Blood Knights , Sociopathic Heroes , and other combat lovers to want to be a Blood-Splattered Warrior. Related to Blood Is the New Black . Not to be confused with or have any relation to Blood Bath .
